source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Warm marketplace English UI with clear commercial hierarchy, legible numbers, and Japanese typography guidance.
layout: Marketplace grids, papaya seed-dot texture, melon panels, 8px radii, clear navigation, and warm transactional states.

prompts.label: Transparent papaya fruit motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Papaya transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a papaya fruit motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A tropical farm papaya cut lengthwise with rich melon-orange flesh, clustered glossy seed-black seeds in the center cavity, cream-green rind, and one broad papaya leaf accent. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, juicy tropical texture, unmistakably papaya.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the long papaya half, a small whole-fruit edge, seeds, rind, and leaf without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no mango, no cantaloupe, no pumpkin, no passionfruit, no plate, no hand, no props, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no second plant species.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Papaya light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Papaya", derived from the visible papaya fruit cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible marketplace UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Papaya, Papaya Fruit, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from melon-orange papaya flesh, glossy seed-black center, cream-green rind, tropical leaf green, ripe coral shadows, and warm farm light. The board must read as papaya, not mango, pumpkin, or cantaloupe.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, papaya-cream surfaces, melon-orange primary actions, seed-black tiny markers, ripe-coral badges, leaf-green success states, rind dividers, papaya seed texture.
Constraints: no mango identity, no pumpkin, no cantaloupe rind netting, no tropical beach imagery, no generic orange-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Papaya", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Papaya dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Papaya". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the papaya fruit cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Papaya, Papaya Fruit, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve papaya system language: melon-orange actions, seed-black rhythm, ripe-coral highlights, leaf-green controls, rind-cream text, warm seed-cavity dark surfaces, papaya seed texture, 8px radius, precise shadcn/tweakcn component grid. Must read as papaya, not mango or pumpkin.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: dark seed-ink and toasted rind surfaces, papaya-cream foreground, melon-orange active states, ripe-coral chart highlights, leaf green focus/control accents, subtle seed-dot overlays, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no mango identity, no pumpkin, no cantaloupe, no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Papaya".
